$comment: Coverage thresholds for orchestrator agents and CI. Portable across projects — adjust values per-repo. NOTE: Thresholds set to 60% as a ratchet baseline. The project has 586+ test files, 10,000+ tests. Generated files (*.g.dart, *.freezed.dart) are excluded from measurement. Roadmap: 60% (current) → 70% (next milestone) → 80% (target). Increase thresholds as more presentation-layer widget tests are added.

enforcement.description: Orchestrator agents MUST check coverage against these thresholds before marking any task complete or creating a PR. If coverage drops below any threshold, the task fails.
